leadText: I'm a self-taught digital artist and educator passionate about making digital painting accessible to everyone.
paragraph1: My journey began years ago when I discovered Krita, an open-source digital painting application that opened an entirely new creative world for me. What started as a hobby quickly became a calling — I realized that sharing knowledge was just as fulfilling as creating art itself.
paragraph2: Today, I create in-depth tutorials, brushpacks, and reference guides designed to help artists at every level unlock their creative potential. Whether you're just starting out or looking to refine your technique, Blade & Quill is your creative home.
